view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom integration is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of a Zoom meeting link.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom integration is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of a Zoom meeting link.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step confirms the requirement for Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams integration is satisfied through the successful creation of a unique Zoom meeting link for a telehealth session. The evidence provided in the linked use case details the automatic generation of a Zoom meeting link, which is included in the confirmation email and added to both the therapist's and client's Google Calendar. This directly supports the requirement of having Zoom integration as part of the service offering.
